description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a series of evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its top surface, creating a slatted appearance. The block is predominantly dark in color, resembling polished black granite or marble, with subtle lighter speckles and veins visible in the stone. The grooves are deep and uniform, giving the block a functional, modern, and slightly industrial aesthetic. The sides of the block are smooth and unadorned, contrasting with the textured top. The overall form is solid and geometric, with sharp, clean edges and a substantial thickness. This type of block is often used in urban environments as a barrier, seating element, or decorative feature.
description: A dark, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface, resembling polished granite or marble. The block has a modern, industrial look with smooth sides and a solid, heavy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the block and the parallel grooves running horizontally across the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the grooves and the block's thickness, with grooves running vertically from this perspective.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the parallel grooves and the block's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the vertical grooves and the block's substantial thickness.
attribute_installation_method: set on a concrete foundation or pavement
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with a polished finish.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
